docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DANIEL ADMASU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN PAULSON IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE REPRESENTED BY JAMES WAGGONER, CLAIMS ADJUSTER (PREVIOUSLY REMOVED AS A DEFENDANT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAULSON, JOHN M.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,961.32 FILED BY ADMASU, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMASU, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PAULSON, JOHN M.
DECLARATION RE: PLAINTIFF'S DISSATISFACTION WITH INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE RECEIVED AT ACCESS CENTER ON 1/23/19 REGARDING SMALL CLAIMS CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMASU, DANIEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMASU, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-14-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,961.32 FILED BY ADMASU, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PAULSON, JOHN M.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE PAULSON, JOHN M.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PROGRESSIVE WAS REMOVED AS A DEFENDANT, BUT APPEARED WITH DEFENDANT(THEIR INSURED) AS A WITNESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO REMOVE PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE COMPANY AND REPLACE WITH JOHN M. PAULSON AS DEFENDANT; AND TO RESET TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMASU, DANIEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADMASU, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE PAULSON, JOHN M. $2,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2160 AND ISSUE CHECK TO PLAINTIFF FOR $5600.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
